summary: This packet ships a three-page submission-grade intelligence-style writing sample on Russia's integrated strategy of control and projection, plus the analytic framework, claim-calibration notes, and version history behind it.
final_use_case: It links regional knowledge to analytic method by preserving source lineage, strategic frame, adversary logic, and claim limits for later Russia/security work.
